title: Remove URL params and single-overlay mode; dashboard-only with widget toggles
description: Strip readParams/pushParams/sync from App.tsx. Remove single-overlay rendering path. Dashboard becomes the only view. Add enabledWidgets set to Zustand store. ControlBar gets toggle buttons for each widget. Layout auto-arranges based on enabled widget count.

title: feature/endpoint-config — endpoint URL input + persistence
description: Endpoint URL text field + UserDefaults persistence (EndpointStorage).
close_reason: Merged to main, pushed to origin

title: Scaled content rendering
description: CSS transform: scale() based on base dimensions vs panel size. Each widget has a base dimension. Resizing computes scale factor and applies it.

title: watchOS companion app: WorkoutCoordinator + WCSession + HKWorkoutSession + SwiftUI UI
description: Build the watch-side counterpart for feature/watch-sync. iPhone WatchSessionManager is already in place. Watch app needs: WCSession activation, receive workout commands (start/pause/resume/end), run HKWorkoutSession with HKLiveWorkoutBuilder for wrist HR, send HR back to iPhone, SwiftUI UI showing workout state/HR/elapsed/calories.
close_reason: Watch companion app code complete: WorkoutCoordinator (WCSession + HKWorkoutSession + HKLiveWorkoutBuilder), ContentView (SwiftUI workout UI), entitlements. Both targets build clean.

title: feature/workout-list — workout type table + HealthKit entitlements

title: Export/import combined widget state as JSON
description: Serialize enabledWidgets + widgetOptions + panels to JSON. Export as file download. Import from file upload. Add buttons to ControlBar.

title: Per-widget options store and UI
description: Each widget gets its own options (theme, background transparency, opacity, dimensions). Popover on each panel. Map widget gets zoom. Remove global transparent toggle.

title: feature/background-badge — background workout + lockscreen badge
description: Background workout continuation + lockscreen Live Activity or local notification badge showing workout name + realtime elapsed time.
close_reason: Merged to main, pushed to origin

title: feature/live-metrics-ui — live metrics display screen
description: LiveMetricsViewController: display HR, HR zone, active energy, distance, pace, steps, location, elevation, elapsed time. Wire WorkoutSessionManager delegate to update labels in real-time. Grayscale minimal UI.
close_reason: Merged to main, pushed to origin

title: feature/pause-end — pause and end workout controls
description: Pause and End workout buttons on the live metrics screen. Call manager.pauseWorkout()/endWorkout(). Toggle pause/resume. On end, pop back to workout list.

title: feature/watch-sync — Apple Watch sync
description: Apple Watch WatchKit app + WCSession sync. Collect HR and other data from watch when present. Mirror workout state between phone and watch.
